MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Rodney B. Sorensen, Esq. of GRAY CARY WARE & FREIDENRICH 650/833-2000, for defendants E*TRADE FINANCIAL CORP. and FRANCISCO GUTIERREZ, moving to compel arbitration and stay action
Noah D. Lebowitz, Esq. of MCGUINN, HILLSMNA & PALEFSKY 421-9292, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court took DEFENDANTS E*TRADE FINANCIAL CORP. and FRANCISCO GUTIERREZ'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action under submission. Each side is to submit an order for the Court's consideration. (301/KMM/JS-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
